title: Erythrocytosis - NHS
text:
can eventually lead to you having too few blood cells. In some rare cases, it can develop into a type of cancer called  acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) .
Page last reviewed: 17 March 2023
Next review due: 17 March 2026
